menuItems.name: Biryani
menuItems.description: Fragrant long-grain rice layered with spices, saffron and choice of vegetables or meat.

menuItems.name: Butter Chicken
menuItems.description: Creamy tomato-based curry with tender chicken pieces, mildly spiced and rich.

menuItems.name: Paneer Tikka
menuItems.description: Marinated cubes of paneer grilled to perfection with bell peppers and spices. Vegan can be requested.

menuItems.name: Masala Dosa
menuItems.description: Crispy rice-lentil crepe filled with spiced potato masala, served with sambar and chutneys.

menuItems.name: Samosa
menuItems.description: Deep-fried pastry filled with spiced potatoes and peas — classic Indian street snack.

menuItems.name: Chole Bhature
menuItems.description: Spicy chickpea curry served with fluffy deep-fried bread — a hearty North Indian favorite.

menuItems.name: Pani Puri
menuItems.description: Crispy hollow puris filled with spiced potato, chickpeas and tangy water.

menuItems.name: Daal Tadka
menuItems.description: Yellow lentils cooked with aromatic spices and finished with a tempering of garlic and cumin.

menuItems.name: Rajma Chawal
menuItems.description: Red kidney beans simmered in rich tomato gravy, served with steamed rice.

menuItems.name: Aloo Paratha
menuItems.description: Wheat flatbread stuffed with spiced mashed potatoes, served with yogurt and pickle.

menuItems.name: Pav Bhaji
menuItems.description: Buttery mashed vegetable curry served with soft butter-toasted buns.

menuItems.name: Idli with Sambar
menuItems.description: Steamed rice cakes served with lentil sambar and coconut chutney.

menuItems.name: Gulab Jamun
menuItems.description: Soft fried milk dumplings soaked in fragrant sugar syrup — classic Indian sweet.

menuItems.name: Jalebi
menuItems.description: Crispy, sweet spirals soaked in saffron sugar syrup — a festive favorite.

menuItems.name: Paniyaram
menuItems.description: South Indian bite-sized dumplings made from fermented batter — savory or sweet.
